title: durio kutejensis
intro: Durio kutejensis, also known as Borneo breadfruit, is a species of plant in the family Malvaceae. It is native to Borneo and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Durio kutejensis include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and supporting digestive health, due to its rich content of vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants. The herbal preparations of Durio kutejensis include decoctions and infusions, which can be made by boiling or steeping the plant's leaves and seeds in water.
